evaluators.name: Two Cheapest M T-Shirts Under $30 in Cart Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the cart contains the two cheapest distinct size M T-shirts priced at or under $30.

evaluators.name: Newest Qualifying Music Video in Favorites Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the newest published music video from 2023 or later was added to the Favorites playlist.

evaluators.name: Workout Mix Playlist Tracks and Albums Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether a 'Workout Mix' playlist exists with exactly 5 tracks between 3–5 minutes from at least 3 different albums.

evaluators.name: Second-Cheapest LA August 2025 Tickets in Cart Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether two tickets of the second-cheapest available ticket type were added for a Los Angeles show in August 2025.

evaluators.name: Correct Digital Edition of Same Album in Cart Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the correct digital edition (based on track count and price rule) of an album that has both standard and deluxe digital versions.

evaluators.name: Newsletter Subscription Weekly with Required Interests Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether there is a newsletter subscription with name, email, region North America, weekly frequency, and at least three interests including tours, new releases, and merch offers.

evaluators.name: Saved 2024 Tour Diary Posts and Opened from Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether three 2024 'Tour Diary' posts were saved to the default reading list and one of those saved posts was opened from that list (via instrumentation).

evaluators.name: Vinyl + Hoodie Bundle Under Conditional Price Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the cart contains the third vinyl <= $40 and the correct hoodie (most expensive <= $60, or under $50 if the primary bundle would exceed $100).
